title: Oru Kadha Sollattaa Sir
description: Three filmmakers decide to write a story, but unfortunately, their writings turn into an awful reality. Alongside, two spirits become intertwined in their tale with their mysterious past. As they grapple with the consequences of their writing, they also face the haunting histories of horrific spirits. This journey is filled with jaw dropping reveals that heighten the stakes, intensifying the horror to keep the viewer's heart racing. The twists aren't merely terrifying; they're also tragic, especially when Yamma – The King of Hell – concludes the mystery.
